/b/pub/tkdiff.help Sep 6, 2015 CONTENTS kdiff3 tkdiff kdiff3 ------ "kdiff3" (kdiff3.sourceforge.net/) can compare or merge two or three text input files or directories. kdiff3 is installed on the Instructional Centos systems i

installed on the Instructional Centos systems in /usr/bin/kdiff3. For a current list of our computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs. tkdiff ------ "tkdiff" (http://tkdiff.sourceforge.net/) is similar to Kdif

http://tkdiff.sourceforge.net/) is similar to Kdiff3. Tkdiff is not installed. Questions to "inst@eecs.berkeley.edu" please. Instructional Support Group 378/386/384 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
